name: Global Dark CSS
format:
<style>
/* 1. ROOT & BODY — blanco */
html, body,
md-content,
md-content.md-default-theme,
.md-default-theme md-content,
.nr-dashboard-background,
#nr-dashboard-body,
.nr-dashboard-main {
  background-color: #f0f4f8 !important;
  background: #f0f4f8 !important;
}

/* 2. md-card — tarjetas oscuras */
md-card,
.md-card,
md-card.md-default-theme,
.md-default-theme md-card {
  background: #0d1b2a !important;
  background-color: #0d1b2a !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(100,181,246,0.12) !important;
  border-radius: 12px !important;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.25) !important;
  color: #b0bec5 !important;
}

md-card-content,
md-card > md-card-content {
  background: transparent !important;
}

/* 3. Group title / header */
.nr-dashboard-widget-group-title,
.nr-dashboard-group .nr-dashboard-widget-group-title,
.nr-dashboard .nr-dashboard-widget-group-title {
  background: rgba(13,31,60,0.85) !important;
  color: #64b5f6 !important;
  font-family: 'DM Sans', Roboto, sans-serif !important;
  font-size: 11px !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important;
  letter-spacing: .12em !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(21,101,192,0.25) !important;
  border-radius: 12px 12px 0 0 !important;
}

/* 4. Group/widget wrappers */
.nr-dashboard-groups,
.nr-dashboard-group,
.nr-dashboard-groups > *,
.nr-dashboard-group > *,
.nr-dashboard-widget,
.nr-dashboard-template {
  background: transparent !important;
}

/* 5. Toolbar */
md-toolbar,
md-toolbar.md-default-theme,
.md-default-theme md-toolbar,
.nr-dashboard-toolbar {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #0a1628 0%, #0d1f3c 100%) !important;
  background-color: #0a1628 !important;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(21,101,192,0.3) !important;
}

/* 6. Buttons */
.nr-dashboard button,
button.nr-dashboard-button {
  border-radius: 6px !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important;
  letter-spacing: .08em !important;
  font-family: 'DM Sans', Roboto, sans-serif !important;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.3) !important;
  border: none !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  transition: filter .15s ease, transform .1s ease !important;
}

.nr-dashboard button:hover {
  filter: brightness(1.15) !important;
  transform: translateY(-1px) !important;
}

/* 7. Scrollbar */
::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; height: 6px; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #f0f4f8; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgba(21,101,192,0.25); border-radius: 3px; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: rgba(21,101,192,0.5); }
</style>
